ddls:
CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or territory the locality belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the locality belongs to */,
  "county" TEXT /* County the locality belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the locality belongs to */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the locality */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the locality */,
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the delivery centre */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of locality (e.g., Delivery Area) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the locality (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the locality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the locality */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the locality in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the locality was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localities_dc_id FOREIGN KEY ("dc_id") REFERENCES delivery_centres ("dc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_centres" (
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery centre */,
  "dc_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery centre */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or territory the delivery centre belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the delivery centre belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the delivery centre */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the delivery centre */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the delivery centre */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the delivery centre */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the delivery centre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery centre was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the delivery centre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, end-user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: State or territory the locality belongs to
Unique identifier for the delivery centre
Status of the locality (e.g., Active, Inactive)
Area of the locality in square kilometers
Timestamp when the locality was added to the database
Timestamp of the last update to the locality
